title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/07/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures surged significantly, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 763.5, up 3.67% for the day.Traders showed a strong willingness to sell. Steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see attitude, as the rapid price increase led to weak acceptance. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
